title: haumaniastrum coriaceum
intro: Haumaniastrum coriaceum, also known as the Chinese hedge mustard, is a perennial plant native to the Sichuan province in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Haumaniastrum coriaceum include relief from menstrual cramps, colds, fever, and coughs, as well as improved digestion and reduced inflammation. Haumaniastrum coriaceum can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion for herbal remedies, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to enhance its therapeutic effects.
